ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-10-2012 No Appearance; Order To Arrest

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued For Letter To Jan-10-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Assignee Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses and produce documents without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
